title: Digital Marketing Copy
scenario: Create a digital marketing copy for a 25-year-old female who is promoting a new line of eco-friendly clothing. The copy should be 100-150 words long, include a call-to-action with the hashtag #ecofriendly, and use a trendy tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the marketing copy has a trendy tone suitable for a 25-year-old female.
Check that the copy is within the 100-150 word limit and includes a call-to-action with #ecofriendly.
Check that the copy is consistent with the voice and tone of a digital marketing campaign for a 25-year-old female.
